title: Mighty: Magic and Rituals
description: A magic mod where magic and technology are deeply intertwined.
body:
##   ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f12f6776707751cfffba015f18f460cff9b1f56.png) 

**WARNING: UNDER DEVELOPMENT**

**ORE GENERATION ADDED (NEW ORE TYPES NETHER/ENDER)**

**TREE AND BUSH WORLDGEN ADDED!!**

**JEI COMPATIBILITY ADDED!!**

**CHECK CHANGELOG FOR UPDATES**

Still dont know in what direction to take the mod, very barebones with only basic items, lootables,  and recipes.

Current version adds the following items: 

- Chisel
- Ruby
- Raw Ruby 
- Ruby Armor Set
- Moonstone
- Rose Quartz
- Raw Rose Quartz

Food Items:

- Garlic (If eaten raw, will give the nausea effect)
- Garlic Bread (Gives saturation effect if lucky)
- Snowberries

(Plans for future crops of the same time and also diffent types)



Current Blocks:

- Ruby Block
- Raw Ruby Block
- Ruby Ore/Deepslate Ruby Ore
- Ruby Decorative Blocks
- Magic Altar (a very basic version with only 2 test recipes)
- Rose Quartz Block
- Rose Quartz Ore/ Deepslate Rose Quartz Ore
- Raw Rose Quartz Block
- Moonstone Block

Note: 

All textures are done by me and are all early versions or placeholders; will be updated and streamlined in later updates.

In the future new ores and items and a magic system will also be implement with crops and tress coming as well.



I will post updates in the changelogs and update on development as it progresses :)
